description: Contest rebuild Stage 3 / Gate C (rhetoric grounding + adjudicator armature) FINAL ratification (Jordan, 2026-07-02). The full Stage 3 exploration (4 rounds, converged, judge findings 1/4/5 fixed, 1041+377 tests green, uncommitted) surfaced 4 open decisions; Jordan ratified all 4 via AskUserQuestion -- filed here DIRECTLY as ratified (not provisional-then-flipped, since the AskUserQuestion answers ARE the ratification, unlike ED-1055/1056/1057-1061 which were filed provisional pending a later Jordan pass). DECISION 1 -- ARMATURE 4TH AXIS: RATIFIED -- keep Insinuation as the armature's own 4th axis. The adjudicator-armature dot-product basis stays {Evidence, Consequence, Authority, Insinuation}. Insinuation is a DELIBERATE NEW 4th axis authored specifically for the third-party-adjudicator mechanism, NOT a claim to reuse canon's actual 4th Resonant-Style type (Solidarity -- npc_behavior_v30.md:39, relational/Knot-gated: 'Any genre + Revealing; requires active Knot'). Solidarity presumes an active Knot between the two orators in the exchange, which does not fit a third-party judge/crowd/panel who need not be Knot-bound to either side; Insinuation instead names what a third party CAN plausibly be moved by -- the implied/unstated register (inference rather than open proof), needing no relational precondition. Numeric weights (STYLE_AXIS_PRIMARY=1.0, STYLE_AXIS_OFFAXIS=0.15) remain [SEED] pending future PP-674 vetting + sim-calibration -- NOT separately blocked by this ratification (the ratification settles the STRUCTURE question only). DECISION 2 -- EPIDEICTIC COMPRESSION: RATIFIED -- accept the 2-genre compression as-is. The 2-genre (Memory/Projection) grid (PP-234, 3->2) stays; Aristotle's third genre (epideictic, present-tense praise/blame) survives ONLY via the ethos_present/praise-blame register (RhetoricalWeights *_present column, live in resolver._advance's joint_weight; the basilikos-logos ceremonial register), NOT as a first-class genre with its own primary-genre bonus. No code/prose mechanic change was needed beyond recording this ratification -- restoring a third EPIDEICTIC genre (cost: a 5th/6th style-card, breaks the clean 2x2 Genre x Orientation style grid) was considered and rejected. DECISION 3 -- CR5 SCOPE: RATIFIED -- keep the Doubt Marker (landed Obscuring, ED-1060) and the self-Face backfire (failed Obscuring, this stage) TOGETHER as the full CR5 realization, not two conflicting mechanics. A landed Obscuring move produces the Gate-B Doubt Marker (opponent-facing, a track-margin penalty on the marked side's next/terminal winning exchange); a FAILED Obscuring move (reception degree 0 -- a genuine nigrahasthana/foul that lands nowhere) now ALSO costs the mover's own Face (min(2, own current Face), the Doubt Marker's -2 as a magnitude precedent, standing-bounded per the ratified CR5 carry-across 'gated by SelfGating.licit'). The separate 'opponent-Face-attack' idea (a landed Obscuring move stripping the OPPONENT's Face stat directly, which would retire the Doubt Marker) is NOT pursued -- the Doubt Marker already fills that landed-Obscuring-move role, so a second attack mechanism would double up rather than complete CR5. No mechanic change was needed for this decision beyond recording the ratification (the self-Face backfire was already wired in the Stage 3 exploration; this decision closes the design question of whether it conflicts with the Doubt Marker -- it does not). DECISION 4 -- CR4 REACHABILITY (THE REAL WORK, code change): RATIFIED + IMPLEMENTED -- fixed the reachability gap. All 8 canonical proceedings previously started at the QUALITY (qualitative) stasis rung (resolver.Venue.start_ground default); stasis only ever shifts UPWARD during play (resolver._advance gates on Stasis.stronger_than, and the Stasis.LADDER order is FACT < DEFINITION < QUALITY < JURISDICTION < CONSEQUENCE < FEASIBILITY); so the conjectural FACT stasis -- the ground rhetoric.STASIS_PRIMARY_GENRE maps to Memory, the ONLY ground that sets Memory primary -- could never be reached in any shipped proceeding, so a Precedent/Suppression (Memory-chosen) orator's CR4 +1D primary-genre bonus was structurally dead in real play (reachable only via a synthetic test Venue built outside the canonical registry). VERIFIED, NOT ASSUMED: read modes.py's 8 PROCEEDINGS definitions + params/contest.md Proceeding Types + social_contest_v30.md Sec2 Step 5 / Sec7 against each proceeding's THEMATIC purpose before picking a fix. Church Tribunal is the strongest thematic candidate: params/contest.md Proceeding Types describes it as 'Inquisitor proposes | Halved for accused | Expert Judge' -- an ACCUSATORIAL proceeding; social_contest_v30.md Sec7 'Church Tribunal specifics: Accused has no corroboration ... Church boosts Obscuring -- the Inquisitor's arguments that foreclose the accused's epistemic standing carry institutional weight' -- the proceeding's whole thematic shape is an Inquisitor INVESTIGATING WHETHER THE ACCUSED COMMITTED AN ACT (an evidentiary/conjectural question -- 'did X happen? was X done?', social_contest_v30.md Sec2 Step 2's own Memory-genre question-shape), not judging the wisdom of an already-settled matter (the qualitative terrain the other 7 open on: Royal Audience is a petition FOR something, Guild Arbitration is a dispute between equals before a bench, Formal/Grand Contest are parliamentary persuasion, Casual Dispute/Private Negotiation/Personal Appeal are informal with no institutional fact-finding role). wrapper.py's own GAMES registry independently corroborates this reading: the future game='inquiry' STUB row already cites 'Church Tribunal / Inquisition (author-new -- later stage)' as its canonical source, i.e. Church Tribunal was ALREADY understood elsewhere in this codebase as the fact-finding/investigative proceeding, before this ED. THE FIX (minimal, surgical, single proceeding): sim/personal/contest/modes.py -- added CHURCH_TRIBUNAL_START_GROUND = Stasis.FACT and a start_ground=CHURCH_TRIBUNAL_START_GROUND field on the church_tribunal PROCEEDINGS spec; modes.proceeding_venue() now reads an optional start_ground field off the proceeding spec and passes it to Venue(...) when the caller has not already supplied one (absent -> unchanged resolver.Venue default, Stasis.QUALITY, for the other 7 proceedings). No new down-shift mechanic was invented (stasis still only ever shifts upward, unchanged) and no other Church Tribunal field changed (exchanges (1,5), roles inquisitor_proposes, resistance halved_accused, adjudicator expert_judge, track_start 6.0 -- all unchanged). VERIFIED WITH A SEEDED TEST built via the normal wrapper.build_contest path (not a synthetic Bout bypassing the proceeding-derived stasis start): sim/personal/contest/_kernel_tests.py new 'CR4 REACHABILITY FIX' block confirms (a) proceeding_venue('church_tribunal').start_ground == Stasis.FACT and the other 6 non-Panel proceedings + guild_arbitration (Panel win-condition) are unchanged at Stasis.QUALITY; (b) church_tribunal's other fields are unchanged; (c) build_contest(5, 4, venue='church_tribunal').venue.start_ground == Stasis.FACT (the real wrapper path); (d) a real seeded Bout built from that Contest's own venue/adjudicator shows a Precedent (Memory-chosen) orator's mean track advantage differs from a Vision (Projection-chosen) orator's on the identical Church Tribunal proceeding, isolating the CR4 +1D as the only difference (zero armature_position); (e) a direct primary_genre_pool_bonus check on the Contest's own live ground confirms Precedent earns the +1D and Vision does not. +7 kernel checks (377 -> 384 total). CANON PROPAGATION (this stage never wrote to params/ or designs/scene/ -- done now, canon leads code follows): CR4 (Ciceronian stasis grounding the genre bonus, including the FULL corrected reachability fix), CR5 (self-Face backfire alongside the Doubt Marker), and the adjudicator armature (the STYLE_AXIS dot-product, the continuous delta-sigma channel via the CR6 'setup advantages accumulate as delta-sigma, tanh soft-capped' chain -- the SAME channel used for Recall/Face/corroboration/prep/commit-spend, not an abbreviated citation -- the asymmetric gate-off, the ratified 4th-axis decision, and the Appraise PARTIAL-reveal boundary) are now propagated into designs/scene/social_contest_v30.md (Sec2 Step 2 stasis->genre table + reachability note, Sec2 Step 5 proceeding table Stasis-Start column, Sec4 Step 3 Adjudicator Armature block, Sec4 Step 4 CR5 self-backfire block, Sec7 Church Tribunal FACT-stasis note, Sec8 Derived Values Summary CR4/CR5/Armature block) + its co-filed social_contest_v30_index.md (regenerated: heading/line/token table + canonical_sha updated, no heading added/removed) and into params/contest.md (Genre and Orientation Bonus Dice CR4 block, Proceeding Types Stasis Start column + reachability note, Interaction Types CR5 block, Face and Rattled header/note updated from '[UNREACHABLE UNTIL STAGE 3]' to '[PARTIALLY REACHABLE -- Stage 3 / Gate C, ED-1062]' honestly distinguishing the now-wired CR5 self-Face strip channel from the still-unwired general strain->Rattled threshold mechanic, and the CR1/CR2/CR3 Substrate header extended to CR1-CR5 + Armature + Epideictic-compression). params/contest.md has no co-filed index/infill pair, so no further co-file regeneration is required there. RATIFIED-COMMENT UPDATES (find every OPEN-DECISION hedge on these 4 items and state the ratification plainly, per the task): sim/personal/contest/armature.py (module STATUS docstring; ArmatureAxis class docstring + INSINUATION class attribute comment; the NB-on-the-4th-axis block comment above ArmatureAxis rewritten to 'RATIFIED (Jordan, Gate C, 2026-07-02) ...'; the STYLE_AXIS table comment + insinuation row comment); sim/personal/contest/rhetoric.py (module header CR5 block gains a 'CR5 SCOPE -- RATIFIED' paragraph; the EPIDEICTIC_COMPRESSION dict's 'decision_for_jordan' field + the module-header epideictic paragraph rewritten from 'OPEN: ...'/'Flagged as an open decision' to 'RATIFIED (Jordan, Gate C, 2026-07-02): ACCEPT ...'; the CR5_ORIENTATION_CHANNEL block comment + orientation_channel() docstring rewritten from 'DEFERRED (open item for Jordan)' framing to 'RATIFIED ... realized via the Doubt Marker + self-Face backfire together'; CR5_SELF_GATING['scope'] and ['open_forks_for_jordan'][a] rewritten from DEFERRED/OPEN framing to RATIFIED/RESOLVED framing (sub-items (b) and (c) -- the exact Face-cost-anchor quantity and a deeper standing-scaling variant -- remain genuinely open, unrelated to this ratification, and are NOT touched); sim/personal/contest/wrapper.py (MECHANICS['adjudicator_armature']['source'] and ['cr5_self_gating']['source'] hedge phrases '[STYLE_AXIS magnitudes + Insinuation axis = Jordan fork]' and 'CR5's Indirect->OPPONENT-Face-attack half is DEFERRED' rewritten to state the Gate C ratifications plainly); sim/personal/contest/_kernel_tests.py (the STYLE_AXIS / Insinuation-row test comments and assertion strings, the CR5 orientation-channel test comments and assertion strings, and the epideictic test comment/assertion updated to match the ratified language and assert on 'ratified'/'RATIFIED' markers instead of 'invention'/'DEFERRED' markers -- kept the suite passing at 384/384, not just the prose). Numeric weights (STYLE_AXIS_PRIMARY/OFFAXIS) remain explicitly [SEED] throughout -- the ratification is scoped to STRUCTURE (which 4th axis, whether the 2-genre compression stands, whether CR5's two halves are complementary), not to the un-calibrated magnitudes, per the task's explicit instruction not to treat those as separately blocked. TESTS: python -m sim.personal.contest._kernel_tests -> 384 passed, 0 failed (was 377; +7 CR4-reachability checks). python -m pytest sim tests/valoria -q -> all green (verbatim count in the Gate C packet handoff). Filed DIRECTLY as ratified / needs_jordan:false (unlike ED-1055/1056/1057-1061's provisional-then-flipped pattern) because Jordan's AskUserQuestion answers for all 4 decisions ARE the ratification -- there is no separate later ratification pass to wait for.

description: Dead enforcement machinery revived (month-overview consolidation): (1) tools/broken_dependency_checker.py check_editorial_ledger() read canon/editorial_ledger.yaml — a file that never existed (the ledger is JSONL) — and its missing-file branch returned clean, so the check was silently dead since inception. Now reads canon/editorial_ledger.jsonl, validates LIVE-status entries only (resolved/struck entries are historical record), and resolves pre-restructure paths via references/restructure_ledger.md (mapped-home hits are INFO, not violations — migrating live-entry text is a Jordan canon edit, queued in decision_queue.md). Triage: 0 genuine broken refs; 8 INFO legacy paths in ED-640/644/648/649/650/651/658. (2) .githooks/pre-commit was tracked mode 100644 (non-executable) — git ignored it on every fresh clone, so the local advisory tier never ran; tracked mode fixed to 100755.

Stale currency-surface reconciliation to 2026-07-01 HEAD (month-overview consolidation; parent ED-1054): (1) CLAUDE.md §6 carried two falsified claims — the four designs/godot/*.md docs DO carry supersession banners since 2026-06-30 (ED-1054), and the adef_threshold port↔oracle divergence WAS resolved (ED-1050, Jordan 2026-06-30, PR #40; parity red only for the un-re-exported RESIST/GAP_EXPOSURE residual). (2) CURRENT.md re-reconciled: stamp 2026-07-01, contest_rebuild in-flight note added to the Social-contest row. (3) HANDOFF.md: ED-ceiling header replaced with LB-21-executed state; stale LB-23 bullet corrected — validate_ed_citations has been blocking since 2026-06-29 with 0 genuine violations. (4) canon/patch_register_active.yaml header 'Next PP number: 724' → 727 (body already held PP-724..726). Full itemization: designs/audit/2026-07-01-month-overview-architecture-consolidation/02_truth_reconciliation_log.md.

Holonic container/wrapper doctrine v1 authored (PROPOSED, Jordan-vetoable): designs/architecture/holonic_container_doctrine_v1.md — extraction of the 2026-07-01 uploaded workflow spec (ingested verbatim under the month-overview audit session inputs/) bound to existing Valoria artifacts. Cross-maps: module_contracts.yaml uniform Key IN -> resolver -> OUT shape = the canonical container contract; sim/ scale subpackages = the holonic ladder; Key substrate = wrapper/propagation (downward delivery stays register #1, ED-1006, Jordan-gated); Key-log parity + typed-params round-trip = convertibility morphisms; P-01..P-14 + no-GM = emergence contract. Names two binding infill guardrails: scripting drift and shape divergence. Defers propagation-spec authorship to a workplan v5 docket item (top-tier judgment; interlocks register #1 + engine_clock ED-1051). Ratifies nothing; creates no agent roster (spec section 7 discipline). Provisional until Jordan review.

Centralization sweep (month-overview consolidation; advances open ED-1052): (1) Combat Pool collapsed to the canonical max(5, Relevant History + 6) — Agility-independent, ED-901 / ED-900/904 — across every live stale site: params/core.md, skills/valoria-combat-simulator/references/combat_params.md (+ proficiency table), designs/scene/combat_design_v1.md, designs/npcs/companion_specification_v30.md (example recomputed 9D->8D), social_contest_v30.md analogy text + comparison row, params/contest.md PP-234-era equivalence note, fieldwork_v30.md ED-NEW-11 historical row annotated, tools/observability/guide/EXECUTIVE_GUIDE.md (+ mermaid). Four Revision-2 (2026-04-15) compilations carrying the struck formula banner-flagged PARTIALLY SUPERSEDED, and found to be TWO docs duplicated across TWO homes each (designs/architecture/{canonical_registry,complete_systems_reference}.md ≡ references/valoria_{canonical_definitive,complete_systems}_r2.md) — duplicate-home resolution queued for Jordan. Mass-battle Effective Combat Pool untouched (distinct mechanic). (2) references/values_master.yaml QUARANTINED with DO-NOT-CITE banner (dead generator; ~70 entries under nonexistent params/combat.md incl. the struck formula; 8 from threadwork_superseded.md) — regenerate-vs-retire queued for Jordan. (3) names_index.yaml v2: proper-noun corpus folded in (60 world.* warn-tier entries generated from proper_noun_registry.yaml; ci_names_consistency now checks 83 mirrored names, was 23). (4) Dead maintenance pointers repointed (glossary.md header+footer, clock_registry_v30.md, params/history/*.md — former maintainer valoria-orchestrator retired 2026-06-28 LB-22); retired session-log/checkpoint/handoff machinery relocated to deprecated/session_machinery/ (CLAUDE.md §1 cleanup executed; ci_register_size_check entries dropped; lane_assignments.yaml annotated).

Container de-leak + shape guard (month-overview consolidation; completes the Stage 1a sigma-kernel convergence, D0-2; implements holonic doctrine ED-1083 §3): (1) combat_engine_v1 runtime no longer reaches into the FROZEN tests/sim/v32-combat-balance station — core.py resolves the sigma kernel through sim.autoload.sigma_leverage (parity-tested 1e-9); the combat-state kernel (WoundTracker, wound_interval/max_wounds/health_full, stamina_max + constants) relocated VERBATIM into combatant.py; DECISIVE_OB/POOL_FLOOR/BASE_POOL relocated into core.py with provenance. Engine runtime is now numpy-free end-to-end (verified by import with numpy blocked); RNG contract changed numpy Generator -> stdlib random.Random (rng.gauss/betavariate/randrange — same distributions, different stream). GATES: deterministic kernel probes byte-identical before/after (30-point effective_ob grid, pool table, constants); seeded 400-fight batch A-winrate 0.885 -> 0.870, diff 0.015 within 2.5*SE=0.058 (byte-identical whole-fight replay is impossible by construction across an RNG-substrate change — the plan's revert clause targeted behavioral divergence, not the ratified numpy-free substrate; distributional equivalence verified instead, TN tables identical). tests/valoria/test_combat_balance_guard.py repointed to the stdlib contract (runs without numpy now); workbench files own their v32 path inserts explicitly (declared measurement-harness exclusion) + pass stdlib rng into the engine. (2) NEW tools/ci_module_shape_check.py — container-hygiene guard (no sys.path reach-ins into tests/ trees, no tests-package imports in runtime code; INFO tier lists untagged module-scope constants, 26 current candidates); CI job report-only (names-drift graduation lane) + valoria_local; 5 unit tests.

Doctrine enforcement wiring + model-tiering update (month-overview consolidation; implements ED-1083): (1) NEW CI job contract-conformance (report-only) — reuses the EXISTING skills/valoria-module-adjudicator/scripts/contract_adjudicator.py A1-A12 machine checks over module_contracts.yaml (never re-implemented); current tree carries ~21 pre-existing violations / ~64 warnings = the ED-1051 backlog, now surfaced on every PR so it can only shrink knowingly; flip to blocking when ED-1051 triage reaches zero. (2) CLAUDE.md §10: fable tier added (restored 2026-07-01; reserved for canonical-contract/propagation-spec authorship, emergence audit, deepest synthesis; metering + no-ZDR caveats; upgrade-trigger-only, never default) + the ingested spec's orchestration patterns (agonist->antagonist relay with structurally-independent read-only critic; worktree isolation for parallel write lanes; fixed-format lane summaries; the scripting-drift and shape-divergence guardrails binding on infill lanes; roster promote-on-recurrence discipline — no .claude/agents/ files created, per spec §7). (3) Workplan v5 §3 docket: J-38 filed — propagation-spec authorship (aggregate-up/distribute-down transform, ordering/determinism, termination guarantee), interlocking conversion register #1 (ED-1006) and engine_clock (ED-1051); decision_queue.md items 18-20 carry the same surface.

Self-updating currency/consistency gate (month-overview consolidation): NEW tools/currency_consistency_check.py — deterministic working-tree checks over the drift class that rotted the currency surfaces during 2026-06 (the PR #50 stale-merge-state failure class): (1) CURRENT.md 'Last reconciled' stamp vs per-head last-commit dates (one-day UTC-skew grace, documented); (2) ID ceilings — id_reservations verified_live_max.ED + in-block next_free + any HANDOFF 'ED ceiling NNNN' literal vs the actual ledger max (the drift that overran blocks A-C); (3) patch-register 'Next PP number' header vs body max; (4) dead 'maintained by' pointers naming skills under deprecated/skills/ (retired-marker suppression); (5) CURRENT.md head-row existence (imports broken_dependency_checker.get_all_repo_files — one rule one home; globs excluded); (6) HANDOFF must carry a '## Next...' heading (silent-blank banner guard). Explicitly NOT re-implemented: SHA freshness (freshness_gate), registry broken-refs (dependency checker), naming (ci_naming_check). Wiring: CI job currency-consistency report-only (names-drift graduation lane; fetch-depth 0); session_status.py SessionStart banner prints summary_line() (never breaks session start); valoria_local mirror. First live run caught 12 items: 9 same-day UTC skews (-> the documented grace), 2 real CURRENT.md rot items (dissolved former-location path fixed; glob filtered), 1 true ceiling lag (verified_live_max — refreshed at this PR's finalize). 7 unit tests.

LC-8 executed (mass-battle engine): Horseshoe/RefusedFlank retired as Subunit.shape values per Jordan-approved go-ahead ("correct, retire them. those are emergent outcomes."), completing the ED-909 formation-taxonomy reconciliation that Stage D (2026-07-01) had deliberately deferred. Removed from tests/sim/mass_battle/geometry.py CELL_PATTERN_FN and config.py MIN_DISCIPLINE -- only Line/Arrowhead/GappedLine/Column remain valid Subunit.shape values; envelopment/refused-flank exist only as the Unit-level engine.build_envelopment/build_refused_flank presets (ED-907/908/909, landed 2026-07-01). bat.py/gauge_mb.py battery rows using the retired shapes migrated to army-builder callables; bat.py grid-mode golden digests deliberately re-baselined (approved behavior change, not a regression -- verified byte-exact against the NEW digests). A real latent bug found and fixed during migration: orchestration.reset_positions reset EVERY subunit in a Unit to one shared shape-derived anchor column each battle-turn, silently correct only for single-subunit units but wrong for any multi-subunit army (collapsed wide-placed wings back to center every re-engagement turn) -- fixed via a per-subunit _spawn_position snapshot captured at construction. Follow-up: the mass_battle workbench (tests/sim/mass_battle/workbench/) extended with a 'preset' spec dispatch so the visualizer can build the new multi-subunit compositions, plus two new symmetric presets (Envelopment vs Envelopment; RefusedFlank vs Envelopment) exercising 3+ independently-tasked subunits on both sides at once; found and fixed a real frontend bug where the preset selector could not represent a multi-subunit spec at all (runBattle() always rebuilt from stale dropdown values). Verified via Playwright-driven runs through all 8 workbench presets in both FIELD_MOVEMENT=1 PC_NODE_COHESION=1 and the integer-grid baseline; H4 (Envelopment vs Arrowhead) visibly reproduces the Cannae pattern by the final frame. PR #59 (claude/mass-battle-audit-5c6nih), 21/21 CI gates green; tests/valoria 81 passed/10 skipped.
